recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did Soren decline the invitation to Friday's reception?
recent_60_samples.answer: Soren could not attend because he had a midterm the next morning.

recent_60_samples.answer: The recruiter explained how internship applications would be reviewed this summer.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have the bookstore clerks restocked the chemistry textbooks?
recent_60_samples.answer: They have no idea when the new shipment will arrive.

recent_60_samples.answer: Ramona realized that several theses had been misfiled by previous staff.

recent_60_samples.answer: Adelina explained why she had missed the seminar last week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Wenjun ask about the dining hall hours?

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Adrian ask about lunch?
recent_60_samples.answer: Adrian wanted to know if the cafeteria served vegetarian options.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Beatrice want to find out?
recent_60_samples.answer: Beatrice was curious whether the lab assistants worked weekends.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you tried the new study lounge?
recent_60_samples.answer: This study lounge feels noticeably warmer than the old common room.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Camila ask the technician?
recent_60_samples.answer: Camila asked whether the printer in the lounge accepted color jobs.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where did the materials end up?

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Eloise want to know?
recent_60_samples.answer: Eloise was wondering if the gallery extended its evening hours.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Gianna ask the advisor?
recent_60_samples.answer: Gianna wanted to know whether the orientation included a campus tour.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Hugo ask the clerk?
recent_60_samples.answer: Hugo asked whether the bookstore restocked the chemistry workbooks.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Iris ask about the equipment?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Does Joaquín still volunteer?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did the librarian explain the new return system to you?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know if my student card had expired.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your roommate Amara say about the heater?
recent_60_samples.answer: Amara wondered when the maintenance team would replace the radiator.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where did you leave the lab notebook after class?

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your professor mention about your draft?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Tell me what happened to that missing tablet.
recent_60_samples.answer: Galen could not remember whether he had returned the tablet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you spoken with the financial aid office this week?

recent_60_samples.answer: I could not concentrate after working through the entire night before our chemistry presentation.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Tell me how the new study room compares to the old one.
recent_60_samples.answer: This study room feels much quieter than the central library does.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Edith mention about those boxes in the hallway?
recent_60_samples.answer: The boxes were moved into the closet near the elevator.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your advisor say about the thesis topic?
recent_60_samples.answer: She asked whether the proposed methodology would meet department standards.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you heard back from the housing committee about your appeal?
recent_60_samples.answer: The committee has not finalized the room assignments for sophomores.

recent_60_samples.answer: Mateo overslept because his alarm failed to ring on time.

recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted feedback about my recent internship at the museum.

recent_60_samples.answer: Roxana explained why she could not attend our final dress rehearsal last weekend.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Tell me what Lior said about the workshop next Saturday.
recent_60_samples.answer: Lior wondered whether the new workshop included a registration fee.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you ask the librarian about the inter-library loan service?
recent_60_samples.answer: she asked whether the printed catalog was still updated regularly.

recent_60_samples.answer: Unfortunately, I have not gathered all the required supporting documents.

recent_60_samples.answer: The speaker Quintin admired delivered a memorable keynote address.

recent_60_samples.answer: He could not decide whether to renew the lease for next semester.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where did the dean place the new orientation pamphlets?
recent_60_samples.answer: The pamphlets were displayed near the main entrance of the auditorium.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you noticed any difference in your study habits this semester?
recent_60_samples.answer: This study lounge feels considerably calmer than the central reading hall.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you leave the laboratory early on Tuesday evening?
recent_60_samples.answer: I left early because the equipment had been reserved by another team.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the academic advisor mention about your transcript?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wondered when the registrar would correct the calculus grade.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Tell me what you discovered at the careers fair on Thursday.
recent_60_samples.answer: The recruiter explained how summer internships would be allocated this year.

recent_60_samples.answer: The notice the dean posted explained the revised dormitory procedure.

recent_60_samples.answer: Yusra wanted to know if her committee members had received the slides.

recent_60_samples.answer: I placed the soil samples inside the cabinet beside the centrifuge.

recent_60_samples.answer: Magnus was curious whether the laboratory hours fit his evening schedule.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you noticed any changes in the writing center?

recent_60_samples.answer: Hector explained why the visiting scholar postponed his afternoon lecture.

recent_60_samples.answer: The driver announced that the morning route would be detoured.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did Sebastien skip the orchestra rehearsal last evening?
recent_60_samples.answer: Sebastien overslept because his alarm clock failed to ring properly.
